title: multi-level board & my work
excerpt:
Description
Enable hiding of ‘done’ subitems in multi-level boards. At the moment they still pull through to my work (column setting correct and ‘hide done items’ is ticked in customisation of my work) which is clutterin…

posts.author: Chloe_555 (Chloe Sorrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Enable hiding of ‘done’ subitems in multi-level boards. At the moment they still pull through to my work (column setting correct and ‘hide done items’ is ticked in customisation of my work) which is cluttering the view with no way to hide them.

What are you trying to achieve

Improvement to how multi-level boards pull through to my work.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oof yeah… I don’t personally rely on My Work much, but I can absolutely see how this would get messy fast with multi-level boards.

Agree this would be a solid improvement:

If “hide done items” is enabled, it should apply consistently across subitems too, otherwise it kind of defeats the purpose.
